prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ZKT-ZT52-PARENT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): Zak Tool Existing Title: Zak Tool ZT52 Tactical Stealth Police Key Ring Holder (2.25-Inch Max) Black Description: This Zak Tools Key Ring Holder was designed for law enforcement to have easy and quick access to their tools and handcuff keys.

Great for keeping handcuff keys accessible on duty belts. Search Terms: handcuff key duty clip belt ring holder chain law enforcement police officer Features: - Key ring attached to belt holder - Slides onto belts up to 2.25 inches wide - Ideal for Sam Browne belts - Steel construction - Black finish === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Zak Tool 2.25-Inch Black Tactical Key Ring Holder

openai.item_name: Zak Tool 2.25 in Black Tactical Stealth Police Key Ring Holder

tokens.name: Tactical Stealth Police Key Ring Holder

anthropic.title_differentiation: Duty Belt Clip, Handcuff Key Access, Steel Construction, Law Enforcement, Fits Sam Browne Belts

openai.title_differentiation: Steel Construction, Fits Belts Up To 225 Inches, Ideal For Sam Browne Belts, Quick Handcuff Key Access
